message:
feat(sync): add SyncConflict error and prevent silent data loss on auto-import

When both the JSONL file and the local database have unsaved changes,
a Last-Write-Wins auto-import would silently overwrite local edits.
This commit:

- Adds a SyncConflict error variant with structured error code
- Detects the conflict condition in auto_import_if_stale() and returns
  a clear error with hints (run br sync or br sync --export-only)
- Exposes dirty_count and jsonl_mtime on StalenessCheck for diagnostics
- Makes resolved_jsonl_path_is_external() pub(crate) so sync can
  correctly set allow_external_jsonl on auto-import/flush configs
- Uses the external-path check in try_incremental_auto_flush() and
  auto_flush() to fix external JSONL export failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
